# Specifications

> **Constitution:** All specs must comply with [CONSTITUTION.md](./CONSTITUTION.md).
> See Spec Laws (SL1–SL5) for naming, lifecycle, and granularity rules.

| [authentication.md](./authentication.md) | Implemented | — | `src/PPDS.Auth/` | The authentication system provides secure credential management, multi-method authentication, and environment discovery for Power Platform development. |

| [dataverse-services.md](./dataverse-services.md) | Implemented | — | `src/PPDS.Dataverse/Services/`, `src/PPDS.Dataverse/Metadata/` | The Dataverse Services layer provides domain-specific operations for Dataverse entities through a consistent interface pattern. |

| [migration.md](./migration.md) | Implemented | — | `src/PPDS.Migration/` | The migration system provides high-performance data export and import between Dataverse environments. |

| [tui-migration.md](./tui-migration.md) | Draft | — | — | The Data Migration screen provides an interactive interface for configuring and monitoring CMT-format data export and import operations. |
| [tui-plugin-registration.md](./tui-plugin-registration.md) | Draft | — | — | The Plugin Registration screen provides a hierarchical browser for Dataverse plugin registrations, serving as the TUI equivalent of the Plugin Registration Tool. |

| [tui-solutions.md](./tui-solutions.md) | Draft | — | — | The Solutions screen provides an interactive browser for Dataverse solutions and their components. |
